packageRules.description: rolldown ships one package per platform binding (@rolldown/binding-*); group them all into a single PR so they bump in lockstep

@assistant-ui/* and @ag-ui/* share peer types (AssistantRuntime, HttpAgent); bumping them independently produces duplicate copies in node_modules and tsc errors. Pin exact versions (no ^) so pnpm dedupes a single copy.
@opentelemetry/* packages share internal type contracts and version-locked peer deps; bump them together to avoid mismatches
@emnapi/* packages are platform bindings that must stay in lockstep

packageRules.groupName: do not apply patch upgrades to dependencies

packageRules.description: vite-plus bundles a specific vitest version internally; these must be bumped together to avoid peer-dependency version mismatches. Placed after the patch-disable rule so patch bumps are still included.

packageRules.groupName: do not apply patch upgrades to GH workflows
